explanation: The user wants to clean the mug. Currently, the mug is on top of sinkbasin_1, which is inside a sink. To clean it, I first need to pick it up. Then, I move it to the main sink (sink_0) where cleaning can occur. I place the mug in the sinkbasin_0 (the basin of the sink) to allow for washing. To wash it, I turn on the faucet (toggle_on(faucet_0)), let water flow, then turn it off (toggle_off(faucet_0)). After cleaning, I pick up the mug again to return it to a safe or usable location. The plan ensures the mug is properly cleaned and handled according to the robot's capabilities and constraints.
